steps.title: Identify the sentence's role
steps.content: The underlined sentence explains why Mapping the Interior matters beyond being strong horror fiction. By featuring Blackfeet main characters, the novella helped ensure Indigenous people have a place within the horror genre.

steps.title: Reject unsupported functions
steps.content: Choice A invents a challenge to a biographical claim, Choice B invents a question about readers who dislike horror, and Choice D predicts future actions by non-Indigenous authors. The sentence highlights the significance of Indigenous representation in the novella. The answer is C.
